arts.ttl: Werder Bremen looking to take advantage of Bayern Munich’s weakness against counterattacks
arts.sum: Werder Bremen midfielder Romano Schmid knows his squad is facing an uphill battle against Bayern Munich, but the 25-year-old Austrian believes the team will be ready to try and take down the Bundesliga powerhouse. One area where Schmid thinks Werder Bremen will be able to exploit the Bavarians is with quick counterattacks — a thorn in the side of Bayern Munich all season.

arts.ttl: Kingsley Coman compares “pretty similar” former and current Bayern Munich strikers Robert Lewandowski and Harry Kane
arts.sum: Losing Robert Lewandowski to FC Barcelona in the summer of 2022 was a big blow for Bayern Munich,. Losing him and that guarantee of goals was such a hammer blow that the German giants were willing to break their transfer record to sign a 30-year-old Harry Kane from Tottenham Hotspur .

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala credits Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany for renewed finishing focus
arts.sum: Musiala has been in fine goal-scoring form this season, and a revelation as an aerial threat. I also resolved to improve myself in a few areas — going into the box, finishing from close range, scoring simple goals, being there for the headers,” Musiala revealed in a interview last fall with RND (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany staying focused on Werder Bremen ahead of busy February
arts.sum: With Werder Bremen on deck for Friday, Kompany knows nothing comes easy in the Bundesliga. Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany is trying to keep his team on the right track as it enters yet another hectic phase of the schedule.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich v Werder Bremen Predicted XIs: Rotation for Vincent Kompany
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany is expected to rotate his squad when Bayern Munich host Werder Bremen in the Bundesliga on Friday night, to kick-start matchday 21. Kick-off at the Allianz Arena is…

arts.ttl: ‘My job is to convince, not persuade players’ – Max Eberl on Bayern Munich contract extensions
arts.sum: FC Bayern Munich board-member-for-sport Max Eberl kept it glib when speaking on the matter of contract extensions for stars Joshua Kimmich and Jamal Musiala while speaking at a Hamburg roundtable.

arts.ttl: Tottenham fans stunned by what they saw Mathys Tel do in League Cup loss to Liverpool
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have been knocked out of the League Cup at the semi-final stage as Liverpool ran out 4-1 winners on aggregate. Tottenham went to...

arts.ttl: Jan-Christian Dreesen explains finer details of Mathys Tel’s loan to Tottenham from Bayern Munich
arts.sum: In the span of just a few days, the narrative changed several times as to where Mathys Tel would wind up before the winter transfer window closed, but he ultimately wound up getting loaned out to Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League. There is a chance for Tel to play more, Tottenham has an option to buy if they want to keep him, and Bayern can re-asses what his future could hold once the loan spell is up.

arts.ttl: Aleksandar Pavlović inspired to follow Thomas Müller’s Bayern Munich example
arts.sum: That would be Bavaria-born duo Aleksandar Pavlović and Thomas Müller, who featured together for an event for Bayern Munich’s club magazine for the occasion of the its 125th anniversary. “Thomas is simply unique, already an absolute legend of the club, a huge figure of identification for every fan and also for me as a player,” Pavlović said as part of his interview alongside Müller in Säbener 51 (as captured via @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Harry Kane tipped to make surprise Arsenal transfer after cut-price release clause emerges
arts.sum: Harry Kane joined Bayern Munich 18 months ago, but is already being linked with a move back to the Premier League after it emerged he has a release clause in his contract
